mask.initialization:
[shouldCompute, cached] = cacheMaskHeavyComputation( ...
    'radius', radius, 'height', height, ...
    'numRadialDivisions', numRadialDivisions, ...
    'numHeightDivisions', numHeightDivisions, ...
    'numFaceRadialDivisions', numFaceRadialDivisions, ...
    'numFaceAngularDivisions', numFaceAngularDivisions, ...
    'angularOffset', angularOffset, 'faceAngularOffset', faceAngularOffset, ...
    'patchColor', patchColor, 'markerColor', markerColor);

if shouldCompute
    [points, imageMatrix] = generateCylinderPointCloud(radius, height, numRadialDivisions, ...
        numHeightDivisions, numFaceRadialDivisions, numFaceAngularDivisions, ...
        angularOffset, faceAngularOffset, patchColor, markerColor);

    cacheMaskHeavyComputation('store', 'points', points, 'imageMatrix', imageMatrix);
else
    points      = cached.points;
    imageMatrix = cached.imageMatrix;
end
